artifacts.claimText: Pusan National University's AI ethics charter/guidelines state that students may use AI as a supplemental learning or research aid, but should not undermine academic integrity and should disclose the source and scope when using generative AI.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Students may use AI as a support tool, with disclosure and academic-integrity limits.

생성형 AI 사용 시 출처, 활용 범위를 명시한다.

artifacts.claimText: Pusan National University's AI utilization guideline tells instructors to clearly announce in the syllabus or early in the course whether AI tools may be used, the permitted scope, and evaluation criteria.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Instructors are directed to specify AI-use permission, scope, and evaluation criteria at course start or in the syllabus.

citation.citationTitle: 부산대학교 AI 윤리헌장 및 윤리 가이드라인 / 부산대학교 AI 활용 가이드라인

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
학습 목표와 수업 운영 방침에 기반하여 AI 활용 허용범위 및 허용 사항을 결정하고, 교수계획표에 명시함

수업에서 AI 도구 활용 여부, 허용 범위, 평가 기준을 학기 초에 명확히 공지한다.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Instructors decide the permitted scope of AI use based on course goals and policy, list it in the syllabus, and announce AI tool use, allowed scope, and evaluation criteria early in the term.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Teaching & Learning AI utilization guideline, instructor section

artifacts.claimText: Pusan National University's AI utilization guideline says instructors should communicate permitted or prohibited AI use for assessments, and it warns against deciding a student's grade solely from an AI plagiarism or AI-detection tool result.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Assessment guidance requires AI-use criteria and rejects AI-detection results as a sole grading basis.

citation.citationTitle: 부산대학교 AI 윤리헌장 및 윤리 가이드라인 / 부산대학교 AI 활용 가이드라인

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
평가 시 AI 사용에 대한 구체적인 허용범위(출처 표기, 부정행위 기준 등)을 안내함

금지 사항

평가에서 AI 사용에 대한 허용/금지 기준을 공지하지 않음

AI 탐지 도구의 결과만으로 학생의 성적을 결정함
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guideline says to explain permitted AI use in assessment, including citation and misconduct standards, and lists deciding a student's grade only from an AI detection tool as prohibited.

artifacts.claimText: Pusan National University's student AI utilization guideline tells students to first check and follow the instructor's AI-use instructions for exams and assignments, and to identify the tool, purpose, and scope when AI use is allowed.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Students must follow instructor AI-use rules for exams and assignments and disclose tool, purpose, and scope when allowed.

artifacts.claimText: Pusan National University's AI utilization guideline says AI-generated text or materials used in research plans or reports should be disclosed in footnotes or references, and states that AI is recognized only as a tool rather than as a coauthor.
artifacts.normalizedValue: Research reporting should disclose AI tool use; AI may be acknowledged as a tool but not listed as an author.

citation.citationTitle: 부산대학교 AI 윤리헌장 및 윤리 가이드라인 / 부산대학교 AI 활용 가이드라인

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal:
연구개발계획서 및 중간(단계) · 최종(결과)보고서 작성 시 AI 도구로 생성한 문장 및 자료 등을 사용할 경우, 각주 또는 참고문헌(References) 파트에 AI 도구 활용 내역 표기

AI는 '도구'로만 인정되며, Acknowledgements나 Methods 섹션에서만 언급 가능
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: When AI-generated text or materials are used in research plans or reports, the AI tool use should be noted in footnotes or references; AI is recognized only as a tool and may be mentioned only in acknowledgements or methods.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: Research AI utilization guideline, paper writing/publication section
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Pusan National University's AX and Information Innovation headquarters provides Sanjini AI, a free PNU-customized AI agent service integrating generative AI agents and campus information agents, for faculty, staff, students, and general users.
artifacts.normalizedValue: PNU provides Sanjini AI as a free AI agent service; generative AI agent access is listed for faculty/staff and students.

AX·정보화혁신본부에서는 교내 구성원이 교육·행정·연구 업무를 보다 효율적으로 수행할 수 있도록 다양한 생성형 AI에이전트와 교내 주요 정보 안내 AI 에이전트를 하나로 통합한 부산대학교 특화 AI 에이전트 서비스 「산지니 AI」(무료 생성형 AI)를 제공하고 있습니다.

artifacts.notes: Claim is limited to student AI use as supplemental aid plus source/scope disclosure; it does not assert a blanket permission for all coursework.
Claim is scoped to course-level disclosure of allowed AI use, scope, and evaluation criteria.
Claim keeps the AI-detection point narrow and does not infer a full academic misconduct procedure.
Claim is scoped to exams and assignments under instructor AI-use instructions.
Claim is limited to research plans/reports and authorship/tool treatment stated in the guideline.
Claim describes availability and scope of the PNU Sanjini AI service only; it is not used to infer academic-integrity rules.

artifacts.title: Pusan National University AI Policy Staged Crawl
artifacts.summary: Official PNU sources support staged candidate claims for AI ethics/use guidance covering student disclosure, instructor course criteria, assessment safeguards, research disclosure/authorship, and the Sanjini AI service. Limited official-domain magazine/newspaper sources were recorded but not used as claim evidence.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The central AI guideline PDF was extracted through Firecrawl PDF parsing; snippets are short source-language excerpts from the extracted text.
The Sanjini AI notice is an official service notice and is not treated as a binding academic-integrity policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
